description: Fake provider fixture for a permission-gated MCP/tool round trip; no provider credential material appears in durable-like records.
sourceBoundary: provider session acquisition is live-only; credential refs are not replay payloads
codecBoundary: provider request becomes PermissionRequest and waits for PermissionResponse
durableEvidence: PermissionRequest row commits before provider continuation
No literal provider secret appears in replay records
Missing PermissionResponse is classified as a permission-gate stall
